title: Cadbery Thank You Milk Chocolate Bar 360g | For Your Special One's, Family, Friends|
features: Creamy Cadbery Milk Chocolate – Crafted with smooth and delicious Cadbery milk chocolate for a rich and satisfying taste in every bite.
Thank You Gift Edition – Specially designed “Thank You” wrapper makes this bar a thoughtful and easy gift option.
Generous 360g Sharing Size – Perfect for sharing with friends, family, or coworkers during special occasions or everyday moments.
Perfect Appreciation Gift – Show gratitude to teachers, staff, clients, or loved ones with a sweet and simple thank you.
Vegetarian-Friendly – Made with quality ingredients and suitable for vegetarians, making it a versatile gift for many.
description: Product description Say “thank you” in the sweetest way possible with the Thank You Chocolate Bar – 360g. Made from Cadbery’s signature smooth and creamy milk chocolate, this generously sized bar is the perfect way to show appreciation to friends, family, colleagues, teachers, or anyone who deserves a heartfelt gesture. Beautifully wrapped in a vibrant “Thank You” edition sleeve, this bar is ideal for gifting, sharing, or simply brightening someone’s day. Whether it’s for a special occasion or just because, this chocolate gift delivers comfort and joy in every bite. Ingredients Sugar, Milk Solids, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Vegetable Fats (Palm, Shea), Emulsifiers (E442, E476), Flavourings.
